AI-powered meeting notes — automatically: AI-powered meeting notes — automatically captures and summarizes your meetings.
To get your API key:\n1. Open the **Gran:
To get your API key:
1. Open the **Granola desktop app**
2. Go to **Settings > API**
3. Click **Create API Key**
4. Copy the key and paste it here

**Note:** You need a Business or Enterprise plan to use API keys.
List your meeting notes with optional da: List your meeting notes with optional date filters.
Only return notes created after this dat: Only return notes created after this date. Leave empty to return all notes.
Only return notes created before this da: Only return notes created before this date. Leave empty for no upper limit.
Only return notes updated after this dat: Only return notes updated after this date. Useful to find recently modified notes.
Number of notes to return per page (1–30: Number of notes to return per page (1–30).
Retrieve a single meeting note by its ID: Retrieve a single meeting note by its ID, with optional transcript.
The ID of the note to retrieve. Starts w: The ID of the note to retrieve. Starts with `not_` followed by 14 characters (e.g. `not_1d3tmYTlCICgjy`). You can get this from the **List Notes** action.
Include the full meeting transcript in t: Include the full meeting transcript in the response. The transcript shows who said what and when.
Triggers when a new meeting note is crea: Triggers when a new meeting note is created in Granola.
Triggers when an existing meeting note i: Triggers when an existing meeting note is updated in Granola (e.g. summary edited, attendees changed).
